manifesto.title: The Huvyn Manifesto
manifesto.p1: We were born out of a simple frustration: moving atoms should be as easy as moving bits. Huvyn is, fundamentally, a technology company solving the world's oldest logical problem.
manifesto.p2: We don't own trucks or ships. We own the intelligence layer that orchestrates the most efficient trucks, ships, and planes on the planet in real-time.

Navigation.tagline: The intelligence layer for atom orchestration. Moving atoms with bit-level precision.

LegalPage.subtitle: Huvyn regulatory framework and terms of service.
LegalPage.content: The following terms govern the use of the Huvyn platform and our logistics infrastructure...

content_blocks.operational_desc: Huvyn Systems AG operates exclusively as a B2B intelligence and orchestration layer for global shipping networks. We do not act as a common carrier, freight forwarder, or customs broker. By connecting to our Proxy Network, corporate entities agree to maintain a minimum SLA of 99.9% uptime on their API endpoints and provide accurate telemetry data. Failure to meet these technical requirements may result in automated throttling of your algorithmic route prioritization.
content_blocks.acceptable_use_desc: The Huvyn network is designed for enterprise-grade logistics. The transmission of illicit goods, undeclared hazardous materials, or mathematically impossible routing requests is strictly prohibited. Our heuristic engines scan all requests; anomalies are flagged and reported to corresponding international authorities automatically.
content_blocks.risk_desc: Shipments with a declared value exceeding $250,000 USD require Class-A cryptographic handshakes at every hub node. Agents must ensure that all physical assets have matching digital twins in the Huvyn registry prior to dispatch.
content_blocks.dispute_desc: All logistical discrepancies, including predictive ETA failures exceeding a 45-minute threshold, must be logged via the Hub Console within 12 hours of the packet's final hub arrival. Disputes filed outside this temporal window are automatically invalidated by our smart contracts.
content_blocks.liability_desc: Our financial liability for any single logistical cycle is strictly capped at the declared value encoded in the encrypted digital receipt generated during initial hub scanning, or $100,000 USD, whichever is lower. Huvyn Systems AG explicitly disclaims liability for indirect, punitive, or consequential damages arising from network downtime or API deprecation.
content_blocks.force_majeure_desc: We are not liable for routing failures or delays caused by circumstances beyond the predictive capabilities of our algorithms. This includes, but is not limited to, atmospheric anomalies, geopolitical sanctions, solar flares affecting satellite arrays, or localized internet infrastructure collapses.
content_blocks.global_compliance_desc: We operate in strict adherence to international trade laws. Our data residency protocols comply with the GDPR (EU), CCPA (California), and LGPD (Brazil). Furthermore, all routing optimizations are bound by the Universal Postal Union (UPU) guidelines for cross-border logistics and the Green-Asset Protocol for carbon emission capping.

PrivacyPage.subtitle: Uncompromising commitment to information security and protection.
PrivacyPage.content: At Huvyn, the security of your corporate data is treated with the same uncompromising rigor as the physical safeguarding of your highest-value shipments. We do not monetize data; our intelligence layer exists solely to orchestrate the movement of atoms. This document outlines the cryptographic and operational boundaries that shield your network telemetry.

sovereignty.title: Data Sovereignty & Legal Jurisdiction
sovereignty.transparency_p: We operate a zero-black-box policy. All mathematical models, third-party neural-compute partners involved in route optimization, and packet deduplication layers are fully disclosed within the Hub Operations Console.
sovereignty.localization_p: Telemetry data at rest is isolated and strictly stored within the sovereign jurisdiction of the origin hub, structurally complying with the GDPR (EU), LGPD (Brazil), CCPA (California), and local state-level cyber frameworks.
sovereignty.purge: Right to Erasure (Purge Engine): Clients can programmatically initialize a Level-3 Purge Request via the Concierge console API. This action triggers an irreversible hardware-level wipe of all associated transit histories within 72 microseconds across our decentralized storage pods.

isolation.title: Strict Telemetry Isolation
isolation.desc: All personally identifiable information (PII) is structurally decoupled from active hub telemetry. Route data is tokenized using asymmetric 256-bit encryption before transmission to the prediction engine, ensuring absolute anonymity during global transit cycles even if intercepted.

audit.title: Immutable End-to-End Audit Logs
audit.desc: Accessing historical shipment parameters outside standard API scopes requires synchronized, multi-signature cryptographic authorization from the origin hub controller, the destination node, and the asset owner. All digital handshakes are appended to an immutable, append-only ledger.

collection.title: Deterministic Collection Logic
collection.desc: Huvyn strictly limits data ingestion to parameters mathematically required for safe asset delivery and algorithmic precision. This is restricted to: anonymized geospatial coordinates during active transit phases, cryptographically signed hub arrival/departure timestamps, and environmental sensory data (temperature/humidity variance). Biometric data, driver identities, and granular cargo contents are never processed by the core orchestration layer.
